_comment: MOCK DATA — NOT FROM MTA. Fictional line shutdown for hackathon use only. Inspired by public reporting on transit disruptions; rail lines L1/L2/L3 are fictional.
title: L1 line — full service suspension
summary: All revenue service on L1 is suspended pending resolution of a labor action affecting on-board crews. Service on L2 and L3 is operating on a normal weekday schedule.
advisories: Shuttle bus bridging is available between S-Jamaica and S-Hicksville every 20 minutes; expect 35–50 minute travel times versus 18 minutes via rail.
L2 and L3 are accepting cross-honor at S-Jamaica during the disruption. Tap-in fares are unchanged.
Riders who can work remotely are encouraged to do so on impacted weekdays.
do_not_state: Service will resume at <specific time> — only state the published estimated_resume value verbatim.
Fare changes — fares are unchanged; only cite the advisories field for fare guidance.
Any commentary on the underlying labor dispute, employees, or union positions.
